name: memharness
description: Bi-temporal, provenance-carrying long-term memory for AI agents, packaged so the proactive experience installs in one command.

plugins.name: memharness
plugins.description: Long-term memory for Claude Code: the memharness MCP server plus a session-start recall hook, a post-commit capture nudge, and a proactive-use policy skill. Turns the raw tools into the proactive memory experience without hand-editing your harness.
